title: AnimaticaReforged
description: A mod implementing the OptiFine/MCPatcher animated texture format
body:
This is an unofficial forge port of [Animatica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/animatica).

Difference: 
1. integration with Embeddium, you can turn on/off custom animation in its video setting.
2. some codes optimization, the biggest optimization is the removal of the validity check for Identifier initialization as it is very expensive.


[![image](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/75401fe6-76e7-471c-89e5-1edd37a950ad.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasualix)
